_comment: Single source of truth for Abhillash's career data, sourced verbatim from his canonical resume (Abhillash_Jadhav_Resume_GenAI_Strategic_Leader.pdf, April 2026). Do not edit content here without verifying against canonical.
headline: B.E. | M.Tech | MBA (Marketing, JBIMS) | 16+ yrs total experience | 11+ yrs Product Management
executive_summary: Strategic product leader with 16+ years across consumer technology, enterprise platforms, and AI-native systems. Currently leading enterprise GenAI product at Wayfair — building agentic workflows, eval frameworks, and the Model Proxy governance layer adopted by 2,800+ engineers across 8 countries, delivering $300M annualised impact and $15M engineering cost reduction. Prior Director PM run at Cimpress (CTL) on a personalisation platform generating $3.2B GMV across 13 subsidiary brands. Four years at Amazon shipping the industry-first AI/ML recommendation engine ($1.2B annualised) and Customer Data Platform across 800M+ customers, 10M+ sellers, and 20+ international marketplaces. Track record spans Search & Discovery, Personalisation, Recommendations, Subscriptions, B2B Marketplaces, and Payments. Cross-functional team leader (teams of 10–21 across PM Managers, UX, Data Science, Engineering); operates fluently across product strategy, technical architecture (LangChain/LangGraph, RAG, multi-LLM orchestration, microservices), and C-suite engagement.

experience.title: Senior Manager, GenAI Product Management
experience.scope: Enterprise GenAI developer platform — agentic coding assistants, RAG-powered PR evaluation, Model Proxy governance layer unifying multi-LLM and Copilot/Cursor backends
achievements: Lead Wayfair's enterprise GenAI developer platform — agentic coding assistants, RAG-powered PR evaluation, and the Model Proxy governance layer unifying multi-LLM and Copilot/Cursor backends — adopted by 2,800+ engineers and 15,000+ employees across 8 countries, delivering $300M annualised impact, $15M engineering cost reduction, and lifting developer velocity +15%, release speed +25%, service availability to 98% (+400 bps).

Shipped agentic, tool-calling AI workloads on a RAG-based knowledge layer across internal codebases and docs — cutting PR review time 40% and eliminating 50+ hours/week/team; defined the platform's eval framework (confidence thresholds, safety guardrails, drift monitoring, HITL fallbacks).

Secured $2M AI/ML investment and multi-year partnerships with Google, Microsoft, Cursor via a quarterly C-suite strategy rhythm; instituted Advisory Committee (8 VPs), Champions Group (20+), and 500-adopter beta program triaging 200+ feedback items — lifting satisfaction +400 bps and beating Q1/Q2 MAU targets by 140% and 250%. Mentor 2 PMs with structured craft development.

experience.title: Product Advisor (Pro Bono)
experience.scope: Sole PM advisor on a zero-to-one LLM-first GenAI supply-chain risk platform for mid-market aerospace & defense manufacturers
achievements: Sole product advisor on a zero-to-one LLM-first GenAI supply-chain risk platform for mid-market aerospace & defense manufacturers; ~40 hrs/month engagement concurrent with Wayfair role.
Defined a 121-day, 4-sprint plan to May 2026 launch; ICP and go-to-market for mid-market aerospace & defense manufacturers.

experience.title: Director, Product Management
experience.scope: Personalization Platform across 13 Cimpress subsidiary brands; team of 21
achievements: Led the Personalization Platform generating $3.2B annual GMV across US/EU/NA — ownership of personalisation engines, recommendation systems, and product discovery across 13 subsidiary brands; managed a cross-functional team of 21 (PM Managers, UX Leads, Data Leads) with 4 hires, 2 internal promotions, and 95% engagement.

Defined a 3-year platform vision and AI/ML-powered data strategy in partnership with Engineering, Data Science, Marketing, Sales, and Operations; led consolidation of 4 subsidiary brands (BuildASign, WMD, NationalPens, Pixartprinting) onto the unified multi-tenant platform in 7 months; conducted research with 30+ enterprise customers and presented quarterly to C-suite. Role impacted by organisational restructuring.

experience.title: Product Head (Senior PM)
experience.scope: Promotions Platform and Customer Data Platform for Amazon Global; 20+ marketplaces; 800M+ customers; 10M+ sellers; $4B GMV
achievements: Led Promotions Platform and Customer Data Platform (CDP) for Amazon Global — 20+ international marketplaces, 800M+ customers, 10M+ sellers, $4B annual GMV — across 20+ partner teams in NA, EU, EMEA, APAC; grew PM org from 3 to 6 with 2 Senior PM promotions.

Shipped the industry-first AI/ML recommendation engine serving 800M+ consumers — combining collaborative filtering, content-based filtering, and matrix factorisation — driving 40% business growth ($1.2B annualised); built customer segmentation and lifecycle targeting using RFM and AARRR frameworks, powering personalised experiences based on shopping behaviour and lifecycle stage.

Architected the unified microservices platform on AWS EC2/ECS with RESTful APIs handling 10M+ daily transactions; integrated subsidiary brands (AbeBooks, Goodreads) onto the unified CDP without disruption; improved engagement +29% (128 → 183 promotions/customer/year), content findability +40%, and seller NPS +400 bps via a UX redesign reducing task-completion time 40% — driving cross-org adoption across 20+ independent global teams without formal authority.

experience.title: AVP
experience.scope: Founding product leader and PM at PayTM's B2B Retail Commerce platform — 0-to-1 Fintech launch; team of 16
achievements: Founding PM leader for PayTM's B2B Payments marketplace (0-to-1 Fintech launch) with a cross-functional team of 16 (PM Managers, UX, Product Operations); owned end-to-end product for Search, Discovery, Catalog, analytics, order management, and promotions — defining vision, strategy, roadmap, and pricing for launch and scale.

Launched 3 zero-to-one products (lending, analytics, insights dashboard) achieving 40% adoption in 3 months; revamped seller analytics platform and partner-facing UI to surface business insights driving partner ecosystem growth.

experience.title: Vice President
experience.scope: Big Brands subscriptions platform; recurring-revenue 0-to-1 monetisation; team of 10
achievements: Owned IndiaMart's Big Brands subscriptions platform (recurring-revenue, 0-to-1 monetisation model) with a cross-functional team of 10 (PM Managers, PMs, UX); owned pricing, packaging, renewal workflows, upsell/cross-sell motion, and customer lifecycle KPIs (retention, ARPU, CSAT, LTV) — delivering Rs. 30 Cr annualised recurring revenue, +87% gross margin, and 1,200 bps GM improvement.

Grew strategic subscriptions +30% by launching the EasyPay bill-discounting integration for existing subscribers (upsell/cross-sell win) and scaling seller billing, renewal, and engagement analytics across the member lifecycle.

experience.title: Senior Manager
experience.scope: Digital and social product roadmap across LeEco smart device portfolio
achievements: Owned the digital and social product roadmap across LeEco's smart device portfolio (Smart TV, mobile, accessories); captured 40% online market share in the >55-inch Smart TV segment for LeTV and drove mobile device share growth via digital product and GTM interventions across e-commerce channels.

experience.title: Senior Manager
experience.scope: Seller activation, onboarding, and data intake ecosystem; team of 12; Rs. 2,000 Cr annualised GMS
achievements: Led the seller activation, onboarding, and data intake ecosystem with a team of 12, owning product and business roadmap across high-GMS categories (Rs. 2,000 Cr annualised) — catalog import, listing validation, and first-productive-sale workflows.

Improved seller acquisition workflow efficiency +33% and seller NPS +200 bps; launched Regional Selection Discovery for Consumer Electronics (+80 bps CM YOY) and Selection Insights in the seller dashboard that sellers adopted to scale GMS.

experience.title: Area Sales Manager
experience.scope: FMCG sales territory; Rs. 78 Cr/annum; team of 7
achievements: Managed a territory of Rs. 78 Cr/annum across hair care, personal care, and food categories with a team of 7 (TSE/TSOs); achieved 24% YOY growth through tailored promotions and range selling — awarded 'Best Team Performance 2013–14'.

experience.title: Area Sales Manager
experience.scope: FMCG sales territory; Rs. 15 Cr/annum; team of 8
achievements: Managed a territory of Rs. 15 Cr/annum across edible oil and food categories with a team of 8 (TSE/TSOs); achieved 18% YOY volume growth — highest in the Edible category across channels and areas.

selected_projects.name: AI Career Counseling Agent
selected_projects.description: Designed an autonomous conversational agentic system (Claude API, ReAct architecture, LangChain/LangGraph) for 1.5M+ addressable students with a dual evaluation framework — multi-criteria LLM-as-Judge (5 rubric dimensions, hard guardrails on safety/groundedness) plus trajectory analysis — achieving 80% output pass rate and 100% trajectory efficiency; optimised the Haiku-vs-Sonnet cost-quality tradeoff for 92% margin over a 7% quality delta, reducing exploration time 99.6% (45 min → 10 sec) and cost 96.7% vs traditional counseling.

core_skills.genai_and_ai_platform: LangChain, LangGraph, RAG, multi-LLM orchestration, Model Proxy governance, agentic workflows, subagent delegation, MCP tool-integration, LLM-as-Judge evals, safety guardrails, drift monitoring, HITL fallbacks, Claude/OpenAI/Cursor integration; AI/ML recommendation engines (collaborative + content-based filtering, matrix factorisation), personalisation models, customer segmentation (RFM, AARRR), lifecycle targeting; microservices (AWS EC2/ECS, RESTful APIs), multi-tenant architecture, M&A integration, developer ecosystem and platform APIs.
core_skills.product_craft_and_leadership: 0-to-1 product builds, A/B experimentation, cohort analysis, NPS, CSAT, VOC, MRD/BRD/TRD, customer research, pricing strategy, recurring-revenue SaaS, monetisation model design; cross-functional team leadership (PM Managers, UX, Data Science, Engineering, Operations — teams up to 21); C-suite and board engagement, matrixed alignment without formal authority, talent development with multiple internal promotions.

_canonical_facts_comment: Addressable leaf keys for every metric, scope number, named system, and title — the trace target for tier-1 claims. Sourced verbatim from experience[].achievements. schema.json defines required fields; tests/test_profile_integrity.py fails if any are missing.

target_search.comp_floor_signal: above senior market threshold for 12-15+ year roles

constraints.honesty_rule: All claims must be defensible in interview against this profile (which itself is sourced from canonical resume). Strategic reframing using JD language is OK; inventing credentials, dates, or metrics is NOT.
constraints.framing_rule_pm_experience: Use '11+ years of at-scale product management experience including enterprise SaaS platform products', NOT '11+ years driving enterprise SaaS platform products'
